title: Annual Implementation Report 2022
body: "Key information on the implementation of the operational programme.  The European Structural and Investment Funds Growth programme is funding for projects that create jobs and supports local growth.  The funds include:   the European Social Fund (ESF) the European Regional Development Fund part of the European Agricultural Fund for Rural Development   The European Agricultural Fund for Rural Development helps with:   improving the environment improving farming and forestry competitiveness supporting rural businesses to grow and expand, improve knowledge and skills and get started   "
